prestazioni: Engine: M279 E60 LA (6.0L V12 Biturbo, 518 HP stock) – Full internal build with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA turbos with custom 42mm wastegates and Tial MV-R blow-off valves, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Akrapović with quad 3.5-inch outlets and a secondary bypass valve for backpressure control.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a full Motec M150 ECU with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a custom fuel rail system by Radium Engineering. Methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 5-gallon reservoirs and progressive controller for 30% methanol-water mix under boost.

Suspension & Handling: Full air ride conversion using Air Lift Performance 3P management with custom valving for the Landaulet’s extended wheelbase, paired with KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (adjustable rebound and compression) for rear axle reinforcement. Front and rear sway bars upgraded to H&R Motorsport 32mm adjustable units, with poly bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity. Brembo GT 6-piston calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (front) and 380mm (rear) for stopping power.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk LB Works, specifically designed for the Landaulet’s unique rear coach doors, featuring hand-formed carbon fiber fenders with integrated LED turn signals and a 3-inch extended rear overhang for aggressive stance. Front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem) in raw carbon fiber, with a functional 3D-printed air curtain system for brake cooling.

Full bespoke interior reupholstery by Saddleback Leather, replacing the stock Nappa leather with hand-stitched distressed saddle leather on the dashboard, door cards, and rear passenger lounge. Custom rear-seat entertainment system with dual 27-inch OLED screens by LG Signature, integrated into the partition wall with a hidden Apple TV 4K and Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series speakers (12-channel).

Exterior lighting overhaul with LUX HID 55W Bi-Xenon projectors (6000K) and custom adaptive LED halo rings by Diode Dynamics. Rear taillights replaced with sequential LED units from Vland, featuring a custom Maybach crest animation on startup. Full matte Satin Black wrap by Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film, with gloss black accents on the grille and window trim for contrast.
